subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-10
subcodes.first_line: In Paris one of the notable representatives of France invited me to attend an evening party and I went. We saw that they had prepared a big banquet with sweets and cakes of many kinds.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @music and singing
